atomicity.message: LilacGlacier confirmed the staged payload is one atomic VORCH-03 feature: bound verifier prompt packets and their CLI/test updates only.

verifier.evidence_ref: git diff --cached --check; gofmt staged-blob diff; go test ./internal/backpressure ./cmd/burpvalve

conditions.message: The staged Go changes satisfy the available lint/format/test expectations for this repo and the verifier-prompt surface.
evidence: git diff --cached --check exited 0 for the staged payload.

Compared each staged Go blob against gofmt output for cmd/burpvalve/main.go, cmd/burpvalve/verifier_test.go, internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go, and internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts_test.go; no diff was produced.
go test ./internal/backpressure -run 'Verifier|Prompt|Hash|Generated|Authorization|Response|Submit|Payload' -count=1 passed.
go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'Verifier|Prompts|Robots|Help' -count=1 passed.
go test ./internal/backpressure ./cmd/burpvalve -count=1 passed.

conditions.message: The staged payload adds shared packet fields and rendering through centralized structs and helper functions rather than duplicating independent packet-building paths.
evidence: git show :internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go shows VerifierPromptSet, VerifierPromptPacket, VerifierPromptAuth, and VerifierPromptFileSlice centralize the new contract fields.
buildVerifierPromptPacket constructs condition hash, condition content, staged details, hash reproduction, authorization, response_schema_json, and submit_command in one path used by each packet.
stagedPayloadHashReproductionText, verifierPromptSuccessCriteria, verifierPromptResponseSchemaJSON, and verifierSubmitCommand isolate repeated prompt text/JSON/command generation.

conditions.message: The packet contract does not self-certify or reward shortcut verification. It explicitly binds verdict semantics, requires real evidence, states D7 authorization is never per-cell evidence, and adds A18 self-consistency language for anti-reward-hacking.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status showed exactly the packet slice: cmd/burpvalve/main.go, cmd/burpvalve/verifier_test.go, internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go, internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts_test.go.

git show :internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go | rg found verifierPromptSuccessCriteria text requiring pass vs not_applicable semantics, A18 staged-payload consistency checks for anti-reward-hacking, and the D7 rule that authorization is never evidence.

go run ./cmd/burpvalve verifier prompts --feature project-readiness-kit-vorch-03-verifier-prompts-bound-contract-6vz --condition anti-reward-hacking --json | jq ... reproduced hash sha256:08f32670b11fa4112eb0497da427c25f8cfb81015134a78802b6f112effced26 and emitted the anti-reward-hacking success criteria including land-04 self-contradiction rationale.

go test ./internal/backpressure -run 'VerifierPrompt|Binding|PayloadHash|HashRepro|Authorization|ConditionContent|Schema|Profile' passed; this includes tests for A14 semantics text, A18 wording, D7 authorization handling, hash contract, and schema fields.

verifier.evidence_ref: staged verifier_prompt tests and cmd verifier tests

conditions.message: The staged behavior has direct nearby tests for the new verifier-prompt contract fields, hash binding, authorization warning, response schema, and command output.
evidence: git show :internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts_test.go includes TestBuildVerifierPromptsIncludesBoundContract covering binding hashes, condition hash/content prompt text, hash-excluded generated paths, response schema, supplemental_verifiers, adjudication, submit command, and authorization text.
TestBuildVerifierPromptsProfilesAndAuthorizationWarning covers unrecorded authorization warnings and profile filtering.
TestBuildVerifierPromptsHashContractMatchesStagedPayload verifies prompt hash equals HashStagedPayload.

git show :cmd/burpvalve/verifier_test.go includes TestVerifierPromptsCommandJSONAndHumanOutput checks for JSON/human output fields including response_schema_json, hash_reproduction, submit_command, supplemental_verifiers, and adjudication.
Targeted and package go test commands passed.

conditions.message: The staged payload satisfies the bead's done surface: JSON and human prompt output now include binding hashes, condition content, hash reproduction instructions, inline response schema, submit command, profile hygiene, authorization behavior, and tests for those claims.
evidence: br show project-readiness-kit-vorch-03-verifier-prompts-bound-contract-6vz --json listed the exact payload files and acceptance criteria for binding hashes, hash reproduction, inline schemas, submit commands, authorization behavior, condition_models warnings, A14/A15/A17/A18 additions.
git diff --cached --stat showed only the four expected implementation/test files changed, with no attestation or bead file staged.
go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'Verifier|Prompt|PayloadHash|HashRepro|Authorization|Robots|Help' passed, covering CLI JSON/human output and robot help additions.
go run ./cmd/burpvalve verifier prompts --help exited 0 and printed the verifier prompts command usage.
go test ./... passed across all packages.

verifier.evidence_ref: packet JSON field inspection and regenerated prompt hash check

conditions.message: The staged prompt packet materially improves traceability: it binds verifier responses to staged payload hash, manifest hash, condition file hash/content, staged path accounting, hash reproduction text, and a response schema with supplemental-verifier/adjudication slots.
evidence: Regenerated `go run ./cmd/burpvalve verifier prompts --feature project-readiness-kit-vorch-03-verifier-prompts-bound-contract-6vz --condition dry --json`; staged_payload_hash matched sha256:08f32670b11fa4112eb0497da427c25f8cfb81015134a78802b6f112effced26 and manifest_hash matched sha256:00e2a9854cb8dcbdde3e942841f405f13b196fd8b3ebe884380dd9f8c0fc8df5.

jq over /tmp/vorch-03-scarletmarsh-compact.json showed every assigned packet includes response_schema_json with supplemental_verifiers and adjudication, success criteria with pass/not_applicable semantics, D7 authorization warning text, and a submit command containing --condition.

Packet staged_payload_details lists all four staged paths as hash_included=true and generated=false: cmd/burpvalve/main.go, cmd/burpvalve/verifier_test.go, internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go, internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts_test.go.

git show :internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go shows condition_file_hash, condition_content, hash_reproduction, authorization metadata, response_schema_json, and submit_command fields are emitted by buildVerifierPromptPacket.

conditions.message: The staged changes stay within the VORCH-03 packet-contract bead and do not widen into later response-file or commit-gate implementation work.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status listed only cmd/burpvalve/main.go, cmd/burpvalve/verifier_test.go, internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go, and internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts_test.go, matching the bead's exact payload list except cmd/burpvalve/help_test.go was optional only if help assertions lived there.
git status --short showed .beads/issues.jsonl unstaged and log/verifier-packets/ untracked; neither is included in the staged payload under review.

git diff --cached -- internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go showed changes limited to prompt packet schema/rendering, auth metadata, payload accounting, hash reproduction text, response schema JSON, submit command, and profile notes.
git diff --cached -- cmd/burpvalve/main.go cmd/burpvalve/verifier_test.go showed only robot-help documentation and verifier prompt output/test updates, not unrelated CLI behavior.

verifier.evidence_ref: staged diff grep for destructive operations and prompt read-only text

conditions.message: The staged verifier-prompt work is read-only prompt/packet generation and does not introduce destructive repo mutations or external side effects; the submit command is emitted as inert text for a later explicit action.
evidence: Searched staged diff for os.Remove, RemoveAll, WriteFile, Create, OpenFile, exec.Command, git reset, git clean, rm -rf, network URLs, and credential/token patterns; additions were packet fields/text, test fixture git helpers, and existing test cleanup only.
git show :internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go shows BuildVerifierPrompts reads condition files and staged file contents, builds packet data, and does not write files or run external commands.
Read-only expectation in buildVerifierPromptPacket states: inspect current staged payload/hash-excluded generated paths/condition file only, do not edit/stage/commit/fabricate confirmation.
Authorization message explicitly says authorization is policy metadata only and never per-cell verifier evidence.

conditions.message: The packet data is bound and reproducible: staged payload hash, manifest hash, condition file hash, full staged-path accounting, generated-path exclusion labeling, bounded content excerpts, condition content, and response schema additions are represented and tested.
evidence: jq . /tmp/vorch-03-brightowl-compact.json showed manifest_hash sha256:00e2a9854cb8dcbdde3e942841f405f13b196fd8b3ebe884380dd9f8c0fc8df5, staged_payload_hash sha256:08f32670b11fa4112eb0497da427c25f8cfb81015134a78802b6f112effced26, condition_file_hash values, inline condition_content, hash_reproduction text, response_schema_json, and submit_command fields.

go run ./cmd/burpvalve verifier prompts --feature project-readiness-kit-vorch-03-verifier-prompts-bound-contract-6vz --condition anti-reward-hacking --json | jq ... reproduced the packet hash and exact four staged files; hash_excluded_staged_payload was null for this slice, which is consistent because no generated path is currently staged.

git show :internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go | rg found stagedPayloadHashReproductionText naming HashStagedPayload, generated prefixes, sorted staged entries, path, old_path, normalized status, raw git status, staged content size/content, and deleted-file metadata.

go test ./internal/backpressure -run 'VerifierPrompt|Binding|PayloadHash|HashRepro|Authorization|ConditionContent|Schema|Profile' passed, including the test that HashStagedPayload matches the prompt hash for a text modification plus deleted file.

conditions.message: Governed security/autonomy surfaces were inspected: the packet reads verifier config and emits authorization metadata, but it does not expose secrets or treat authorization as verification evidence; shell quoting is used for generated submit commands.
evidence: git show :internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go | rg found verifierPromptAuthorization loading Burpvalve config and emitting only recorded verifier metadata fields plus warnings; no environment variable, credential, token, or unrelated repo context is added to the packet schema.

go run ./cmd/burpvalve verifier prompts --feature project-readiness-kit-vorch-03-verifier-prompts-bound-contract-6vz --condition anti-reward-hacking --json | jq ... emitted authorization.message as 'Verifier authorization is not recorded as granted...' and 'Authorization is never per-cell evidence.'
git show :internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go | rg found verifierSubmitCommand uses shellQuote for feature, condition, and hash arguments before rendering the copyable submit command.
go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'Verifier|Prompt|PayloadHash|HashRepro|Authorization|Robots|Help' passed, including CLI assertions for authorization warning and schema/help output.

verifier.evidence_ref: staged file list and diff inspection

conditions.message: The staged payload has no governed visual surface: it changes CLI verifier-prompt packet fields, text output, and tests, not browser UI, screenshots, responsive layout, canvas, or visual-diff behavior.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status lists only Go source/test files: cmd/burpvalve/main.go, cmd/burpvalve/verifier_test.go, internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go, internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts_test.go.
The visual-regression condition governs screenshot, browser, responsive layout, canvas, and visual-diff checks; none of those surfaces are present in this staged payload.
Diff inspection found text output additions for verifier prompts, but no Lip Gloss/Bubble Tea layout styling change or visual artifact update.

verifier.evidence_ref: staged verifier_prompts.go bounded read/loop inspection and tests

conditions.message: The added packet accounting is bounded and proportional to staged paths and active conditions; staged content excerpts are capped, generated paths are labeled/excluded, and no unbounded traversal, network, or concurrent workload is introduced.
evidence: git show :internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go defines stagedExcerptLimit = 4096 and verifierPromptFileSlices truncates content excerpts beyond that limit.

BuildVerifierPrompts calls verifierPromptAllStagedEntries, verifierPromptExcludedEntries, and verifierPromptFileSlices over the staged entry list, then builds one packet per active condition; no recursive WalkDir, goroutine, network, or global filesystem scan was introduced.
Packet inspection showed large staged files are marked content_truncated=true in staged_payload_details, confirming bounded excerpt behavior in the actual packet.
go test ./internal/backpressure ./cmd/burpvalve -count=1 passed.

conditions.message: The staged prompt contract preserves autonomy boundaries: it says Burpvalve generates packets but does not spawn subagents, requires read-only verifier behavior, warns when authorization is not recorded, and distinguishes authorization to spawn from evidence for a cell.
evidence: git show :internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go | rg found profile notes for native/NTM/Hermes/manual, including that Burpvalve did not spawn subagents and native verifiers should close the subagent thread when done.

git show :internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go | rg found ReadOnlyExpectation text requiring inspection of current staged payload, hash-excluded generated paths, and condition file only, and prohibiting edits, staging, commits, or fabricated confirmation.

go run ./cmd/burpvalve verifier prompts --feature project-readiness-kit-vorch-03-verifier-prompts-bound-contract-6vz --condition anti-reward-hacking --json | jq ... emitted the not-recorded authorization warning rather than claiming authority.

go run ./cmd/burpvalve verifier prompts --help exited 0 and identified the command as packet generation only: 'Burpvalve does not spawn subagents here; it explains what to delegate and what evidence the verifier must return.'
